allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('Node:', process.version, 'Next:', p.dependencies.next\)")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('ephemeris'\); const d = new Date\('2000-01-01T12:00:00Z'\); const r = e.getAllPlanets\(d, 2.17, 41.38, 0\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r.observed\)\); console.log\('sun:', r.observed.sun.apparentLongitudeDd, 'retrograde:', r.observed.sun.retrograde\); console.log\('chiron:', r.observed.chiron?.apparentLongitudeDd\)")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('ephemeris'\); const d = new Date\('2000-01-01T12:00:00Z'\); const r = e.getAllPlanets\(d, 2.17, 41.38, 0\); console.log\('mars raw keys:', Object.keys\(r.observed.mars.raw || {}\)\); console.log\('mars full:', JSON.stringify\(r.observed.mars, null, 2\).slice\(0,500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('ephemeris'\); const d = new Date\('2000-01-01T12:00:00Z'\); const r = e.getAllPlanets\(d, 2.17, 41.38, 0\); console.log\('position keys:', Object.keys\(r.observed.mars.raw.position || {}\)\); const p = r.observed.mars.raw.position; if\(p\) console.log\('pos:', JSON.stringify\(p\).slice\(0,300\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('ephemeris'\); const d = new Date\('2000-01-01T12:00:00Z'\); const r = e.getAllPlanets\(d, 2.17, 41.38, 0\); const p = r.observed.mars.raw.position; console.log\('is_retrograde:', p.is_retrograde\); console.log\('apparentLongitude:', p.apparentLongitude\); console.log\('apparentLongitude30String:', p.apparentLongitude30String\);")
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix UTF-8 BOM in locale JSON files causing 500 on checkout *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix Resend lazy init — don'\\''t crash at build if RESEND_API_KEY missing *)
